citations.narrative:
On October 15, 2025, the licensee acquired a 4 month old male grey wolf named "Cane”. Cane routinely interacts with the
facility’s juvenile grizzly bears and is exhibited online. Grey wolves are classified under hyenas and/or exotic and wild
canids and requires prior authorization under the exhibitor license. Licenses authorize a specific number of animals and
specific types of animals. The current license does not authorize the possession of hyenas and/or exotic and wild canids
for regulated purposes. The licensee must obtain authorization for hyenas and/or exotic and wild canids to conduct
regulated activity with the grey wolf under the licensing requirements of the Animal Welfare Act. The licensee must
remove the exotic and wild canid from exhibition until a new license is obtained which authorizes the use of this special
species group. The re-license application was completed at time of inspection.
Correct from this day forward, 2/4/2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives.
Additional Inspectors:
KRISTIN NAPOLI, SUPERVISORY ANIMAL CARE SPECIALIST n

narrative:
2.1(b)(2)(ii) 
   
Requirements and application 
On October 15, 2025, the licensee acquired a 4 month old male grey wolf named "Cane”. Cane routinely interacts with the 
facility’s juvenile grizzly bears and is exhibited online. Grey wolves are classified under hyenas and/or exotic and wild 
canids and requires prior authorization under the exhibitor license. Licenses authorize a specific number of animals and 
specific types of animals. The current license does not authorize the possession of hyenas and/or exotic and wild canids 
for regulated purposes. The licensee must obtain authorization for hyenas and/or exotic and wild canids to conduct 
regulated activity with the grey wolf under the licensing requirements of the Animal Welfare Act. The licensee must 
remove the exotic and wild canid from exhibition until a new license is obtained which authorizes the use of this special 
species group. The re-license application was completed at time of inspection.  
Correct from this day forward, 2/4/2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives. 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
KRISTIN NAPOLI, SUPERVISORY ANIMAL CARE SPECIALIST n
